requirements.text: Build and maintain high-quality payment processing systems with React.js and relevant technologies
requirements.source_quote: Design, develop, and maintain high-quality payment processing systems using React.js and other relevant technologies

requirements.text: Design transaction experiences optimized for speed, security, reliability, and user trust
requirements.source_quote: Build and refine seamless transaction experiences that optimize fund transfers for speed, security, and reliability

requirements.text: Set a high bar for secure code in complex financial software systems
requirements.source_quote: Set the standard for high-quality, secure code and lead the development of complex financial software systems

requirements.text: Influence technical decisions, strategy, and product/domain decisions in financial systems
requirements.source_quote: Influence technical decisions, contribute to strategy discussions, and shape product/domain decisions

requirements.text: Mentor engineers and drive process improvements toward technical excellence
requirements.source_quote: Mentor engineers, foster a culture of technical excellence, and drive process improvements

requirements.text: Design scalable, maintainable, and fault-tolerant financial systems with compliance and security best practices
requirements.source_quote: Design and implement scalable, maintainable, and fault-tolerant financial systems, ensuring compliance and security best practices

requirements.text: Understand cryptocurrency industry and blockchain technology
requirements.source_quote: Knowledge of the cryptocurrency industry and blockchain technology

responsibilities.text: Integrate Kraken systems with payment providers and payment flows for the first and last mile of client funds.
Build systems that communicate with blockchains to process client transactions safely and on time.
Develop React.js payment processing interfaces and onboarding flows that reduce friction and increase trust.
Lead secure implementation practices, mentor engineers, and shape technical and product decisions for payments systems.

success_outcomes.text: Client fund transfers are faster, more reliable, and safer across digital and fiat payment rails.
Users can onboard and interact with payment systems through intuitive flows that build trust.
Payments code and architecture meet a senior bar for maintainability, fault tolerance, compliance, and security.

keyword_signals.reason: Core technology named in payment processing responsibilities.
Explicit framework requirement tied to web and mobile application experience.
Explicit quality requirement for frontend delivery.
Domain focus repeated across team and opportunity sections.
Team scope and nice-to-have domain knowledge signal.
Security and client funds protection are central screening themes.
Architecture standard explicitly called out for senior scope.
Explicit requirement and onboarding/transaction experience responsibility.

screening_priorities.reason: The role centers on React/TypeScript delivery for payment processing systems.
screening_priorities.evidence: Design, develop, and maintain high-quality payment processing systems using React.js

screening_priorities.reason: Payments at Kraken require security, reliability, and client funds protection rather than generic frontend work.
screening_priorities.evidence: your focus is on protecting client funds

screening_priorities.reason: The job asks for senior influence, mentoring, and process improvements in financial software development.
screening_priorities.evidence: Mentor engineers, foster a culture of technical excellence, and drive process improvements

screening_priorities.reason: API integration, WebSockets, frontend testing, and build tooling are explicit technical filters.
screening_priorities.evidence: Experience with Next.js, RESTful APIs and WebSockets

screening_priorities.reason: Crypto and blockchain knowledge is a nice-to-have but strengthens domain credibility for Payward/Kraken.
screening_priorities.evidence: Knowledge of the cryptocurrency industry and blockchain technology
